title: Ragasiyamai Song Lyrics Dum Dum Dum
stanzas:
Ragasiyamaai ragasiyamaai
punnagaithaal porul ennavo
Ragasiyamaai ragasiyamaai
punnagaithaal porul ennavo

solla thudikkum vaarthai kirangum
thondai kuliyil oosi irangum
ilai vadivil idhayam irukkum
malai vadivil adhuvum kanakkum

sirithu sirithu siraiyile
sikkikolla adam pidikkum
ho hoho ho hoho ho hoho

Ragasiyamaai ragasiyamaai
punnagaithaal porul ennavo
adhisayamaai avasaramaai
mozhi tholaindhaal porul ennavo

solla thudikkum vaarthai kirangum
thondai kuliyil oosi irangum
ilai vadivil idhayam irukkum
malai vadivil adhuvum kanakkum

sirithu sirithu siraiyile
sikkikolla adam pidikkum
ho hoho ho hoho ho hoho

Nilam neer kaatrile
minsarangal pirandhidum
kadhal tharum minsaramo
prabanjathai kadanthidum

nijamaai ennai theendinaal
nijamaai ennai theendinaal
paniyai paniyai uruginen

oliyaau nee ennai theendinaal
nuraiyaai unnul karaigiren
kadhal idhu thaane
vandhaa yeno ularalgalthaano

Velli tharai polave
en idhayam irundhadhu
mella vandhu un viral
kadhal endru ezhudhudhu

orunaal kadhal en vasal
orunaal kadhal en vasal
varavaa varavava kettadhu
marunaal kadhal en veettukkul
adimai saasanam neettudhu

adhuvo adhu idhuvo
udhu yedhuvo adhai
naam ariyomae.

Ragasiyamaai ragasiyamaai
punnagaithaal porul ennavo
avasaramaai avasaramaai
mozhi tholaindhaal porul ennavo

solla thudikkum vaarthai kirangum
thondai kuliyil oosi irangum
ilai vadivil idhayam irukkum
malai vadivil adhuvum kanakkum

sirithu sirithu siraiyile
sikkikolla adam pidikkum
ho hoho ho hoho ho hoho

seo.title: Ragasiyamai Song Lyrics Dum Dum Dum
seo.description: Full Ragasiyamai songs lyrics, Dum Dum Dum Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Karthik Raja, Singer(s): Sadhana Sargam.
seo.keywords: Dum Dum Dum, Karthik Raja, Sadhana Sargam, Ragasiyamai full lyrics, Dum Dum Dum songs lyrics, Ragasiyamai lyrics snippets, Ragasiyamai WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Ragasiyamai lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ragasiyamai?

The song Ragasiyamai conveys themes of love and romance, celebrating the beauty of relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Dum Dum Dum?

The movie Dum Dum Dum revolves around love and the challenges faced by the protagonists in their romantic journey.

Who is the singer of Ragasiyamai?

The song is sung by the talented Sadhana Sargam, known for her melodious voice.

Who composed the music for Ragasiyamai?

The music for Ragasiyamai was composed by Karthik Raja, who is known for his unique style in Tamil cinema.

When was Ragasiyamai released?

The song was released on April 13, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Dum Dum Dum, the song Ragasiyamai beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and joy between the lead characters. It showcases the playful and romantic moments that define their relationship. The upbeat melody and Sadhana Sargam's soulful rendition evoke a sense of happiness and celebration. This song is a perfect backdrop for romantic occasions, making it a cherished favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ragasiyamai from the movie Dum Dum Dum is a delightful melody that captures the essence of romance and joy. With Sadhana Sargam's enchanting vocals and Karthik Raja's captivating composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the world of love and happiness with this timeless classic!
stanzaMeanings: In secrecy, in secrecy, what is the treasure that comes with joy? In secrecy, in secrecy, what is the treasure that comes with joy?
Words that start with a whisper, a spark in the heart, a leaf that falls, the heart stays in the night, and that too counts.
Laughing, laughing, in the prison, it captures the heart, ho hoho ho hoho ho hoho.
In secrecy, in secrecy, what is the treasure that comes with joy? Wonderfully, urgently, what is the treasure when words are lost?
Words that start with a whisper, a spark in the heart, a leaf that falls, the heart stays in the night, and that too counts.
Laughing, laughing, in the prison, it captures the heart, ho hoho ho hoho ho hoho.
In the earth, in the water, when the stars are born, does love give birth to stars? It transcends the universe.

If you seek me, I will be in you, I will be in you, is this love that has come, or is it just a dream?
Wonderfully, urgently, what is the treasure when words are lost? (2)
Like a silver plate, my heart has come softly, your finger writes love.
One day love will come to my door, one day love will come to my door, will it come, will it come? The next day love will be a slave in my house.
Is that it, is this it, what is that? We do not know.
In secrecy, in secrecy, what is the treasure that comes with joy? Urgently, urgently, what is the treasure when words are lost?
